positive: A vibrant, stylized jungle safari scene featuring a majestic Bengal tiger walking confidently through tropical foliage. The composition should use a strong central silhouette of the tiger against a backdrop of lush, oversized leaves and exotic flowers. Use highly saturated jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, gold, and teal) with deep shadows and bright highlights to create dramatic contrast. Style: Flat vector illustration meets retro psychedelia poster art. Focus on clean lines, graphic impact, and a seamless pattern feel, making it perfect for repeating apparel prints. Highly detailed, clean, graphic, central focus.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, deformed, low-res, dirty, abstract, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, noise, noisey
